analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights Chinese peacekeepers completing assistance and reconstruction at Beirut Port and reaffirms China’s commitment to supporting UN peacekeeping to maintain world peace and stability. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—portrays China as contributing to UN peacekeeping with concrete actions, aiding reconstruction, and maintaining global peace and stability, fitting the cooperative, peace-promoting framing. CH3 (Epic history): Not mentioned. CH4 (Appropriate political system/values domestically): Not discussed; focus is international role, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP governance success): No claims about domestic development or governance achievements. CH6 (Culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
